Package de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution

Class ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessBaseExecutionNode<S extends SourceElement>

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessExecutionElement
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessExecutionNode<S>
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessBaseExecutionNode<S>
All Implemented Interfaces:
IExecutionBaseMethodReturn<S>, IExecutionElement, IExecutionNode<S>
Direct Known Subclasses:
ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessExceptionalMethodReturn, ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessMethodReturn
Enclosing class:
ExecutionNodeReader
public abstract static class ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessBaseExecutionNode<S extends SourceElement> extends ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessExecutionNode<S> implements IExecutionBaseMethodReturn<S>
An implementation of IExecutionBaseMethodReturn which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.

    • AbstractKeYlessBaseExecutionNode

      protected AbstractKeYlessBaseExecutionNode(IExecutionNode<?> parent, String name, String formatedPathCondition, boolean pathConditionChanged, String signature, String formatedMethodReturn)
      Constructor.
      Parameters:
      parent - The parent IExecutionNode.
      name - The name of this node.
      formatedPathCondition - The formated path condition.
      pathConditionChanged - Is the path condition changed compared to parent?
      signature - The signature.
      formatedMethodReturn - The formated method return condition.

      public JTerm getMethodReturnCondition() throws ProofInputException
      Returns the condition under which this method return is reached from the calling IExecutionMethodCall.
      Specified by:

      Returns:
